title: Resolve acct:user@domain handle via WebFinger to actor URI
description:
Given an acct handle like gargron@mastodon.social, perform: (1) WebFinger lookup at https://mastodon.social/.well-known/webfinger?resource=acct:gargron@mastodon.social, (2) extract self link with type application/activity+json, (3) return the actor URI. Handle servers that don't have host-meta and those that do.

Agent workflow: Spawn a research subagent to test handle resolution for several fediverse servers (mastodon.social, fosstodon.org, hachyderm.io) and document any variation in WebFinger response structure.

Test discipline:
- Test with hardcoded fixture WebFinger responses (NOT live network calls in unit tests)
- Test: response with multiple links returns the correct self+activity+json link
- Test: no self link in response returns clear error
- Test: WebFinger returns 404 returns NotFound error

Defensive programming:
- Validate the resolved URI before proceeding: must be https://, must be on expected domain
- Prevent SSRF: reject acct handles pointing to localhost, 10.x, 192.168.x, 172.16-31.x
acceptance_criteria: Resolves real acct handles using fixture responses; selects correct link from multi-link JRD; rejects localhost/private IP actor URIs
